## Summary

<!-- 1-3 bullets describing what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation only (`docs`)
- [ ] Build / CI / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow the format described in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I added or updated tests covering the change
- [ ] `mvn clean verify` passes locally
- [ ] Public Javadoc, log messages, and exception messages are in English
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if user-visible
- [ ] I updated `README.md` / `docs/` if behavior or API changed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or environment-specific paths are committed
